# Deliverables

## Project Deliverables by Phase

### Phase 1 Deliverables
- Staffed project team (minimum 8 FTEs)
- Core banking system configured and tested
- Mobile application (Android & iOS) live on app stores
- USSD channel operational
- 50 agents recruited and trained
- Brand and communication materials

### Phase 2 Deliverables
- 1,000 registered digital members
- 500 loans disbursed via digital channel
- 20 financial literacy workshops completed
- Mid-term evaluation report
- KES 5M in digital savings mobilized

### Phase 3 Deliverables
- 5,000 registered digital members
- 3,000 total loans disbursed
- KES 20M in total savings
- Sustainability plan approved by Board
- Final project evaluation report

## Reporting Schedule

| Report | Frequency | Audience |
|---|---|---|
| Progress Report | Quarterly | Donor, Board |
| Financial Report | Monthly | Board, Finance |
| M&E Report | Bi-annually | All Stakeholders |
| Final Report | End of project | Donor, SASRA |
